title: More Bedrock
description: Adds more 2 more uses to bedrock!
body:
# Adds more uses to bedrock! (Right now its useless!)


# Recipes:

### Recipe for Bedrock Nugget

![Recipe for Bedrock Nugget (one nether star in middle, 3 nether bricks on bottom and iron on everything else)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6fabfe44ff05928d9308abcbe790f87bbd773c.png)

### Recipe for Bedrock

![Recipe for Bedrock (9 bedrock nuggets)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35138cde71fd1387dd92b777862f4871433839bf_0.webp)

### Recipe for Bedrock stick

![Recipe for Bedrock Stick (2 bedrock on top and bottom and 1 nether start in middle)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e9def2800967084bf2320b40ed40a79a146ff8b_0.webp)

## Recipe for Bedrock Sword

![Recipe for Bedrock Sword (1 bedrock stick on bottom and 2 bedrock ontop)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24cfa36596fb5f0547eba17161707c806b2d01be_0.webp)






## Features:

**Bedrock stick breaks bedrock via right click (has duribility!)**

**Bedrock sword has high damage with high durability but low attack speed**
